title: The Marines Try to Stop Sabo
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the marines try to stop sabo, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Fujitora, Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as sabo confronts the Marines and Fujitora while Luffy's group keeps moving toward the palace and Dressrosa's decisive battle.

dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Sir!

dialogue.text: It so happens that the former user of the Mera Mera No mi,

dialogue.text: fire first ace, who died during the war of the greatest,

dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was wondering if I was a kid, I would have been a

dialogue.text: My my my my, what troublesome siblings.

dialogue.text: Waha Aaah H!!!!!

summary: The Marines Try to Stop Sabo develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Fujitora, Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Luffy, Unknown person #2, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
